positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest creature, perhaps a bioluminescent fox or a spirit stag, standing among abstract, stylized flora. The composition should feature a strong central silhouette against a gradient background of deep indigo and emerald green. Use a limited, contrasting color palette with pops of neon teal, glowing gold, and deep violet for magical accents. The style should be clean, modern vector art meets detailed etched linework, suitable for screen printing. Focus on sharp outlines, symmetry, and high contrast to ensure excellent print quality. Minimalistic composition, high detail on the creature and plant life, centered for apparel design.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, cropped, artifacts, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, duplicate, grainy, sketch, monochrome, photographic
